purpose: Frontend heatmap over NASA-observed ocean grids, selectable by date, AOI, product, metric and resolution.
grain: event_date + aoi_id + product_id + metric_id + resolution_km + grid_id

display_contract.note: metric_value and relative_score are null when value_source=no_data; API and frontend must render no_data separately from zero

limitations: All scores are within-day AOI percentiles and do not compare absolute values across dates.
Filled NASA values are display estimates rather than direct observations; values that cannot be filled remain no_data.
Fishing hours represent apparent fishing effort, not catch.
